updates.name: Adobe Firefly Custom Models
updates.description: Train Adobe's AI on your own images to replicate your unique art style, character designs, or photographic look. Upload 10-30 images and Firefly creates a reusable model that preserves your stroke weight, color palettes, and lighting across generations.

updates.name: Google Flow Unified Workspace
updates.description: Google merged ImageFX and Whisk into Flow, creating a single AI creative studio for image generation, video creation, and editing. Now includes a timeline editor for trimming and sequencing clips, powered by Veo 3 and Nano Banana 2.

updates.name: LTX Desktop
updates.description: Free, open-source AI video editor that runs fully locally on your GPU. Combines a non-linear editor with on-device text-to-video, image-to-video, and audio-to-video generation. Imports timelines from Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and Final Cut Pro.

updates.name: World AgentKit
updates.description: Verification tool from Sam Altman's World that confirms a real human is behind AI shopping agents. Uses iris-scan-based World ID and integrates with Coinbase's x402 protocol to prevent bot fraud in agentic commerce.

updates.name: Perplexity Computer
updates.description: A unified AI workspace that orchestrates 19 models in parallel — including GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro — to plan, delegate, and complete complex projects from a single conversation. Personal Computer runs 24/7 on a Mac mini.

updates.name: ChatGPT for Excel
updates.description: OpenAI's Excel add-in powered by GPT-5.4 lets you build financial models, trace formula errors, and run scenario analysis through natural conversation inside your workbook. Scores 87% on spreadsheet modeling benchmarks.

updates.name: Microsoft Zero Trust for AI
updates.description: New security framework and assessment tool for organizations deploying AI. Adds an AI pillar to Microsoft's Zero Trust architecture with practical guidance, reference architecture, and a self-assessment tool arriving summer 2026.

updates.name: Grok Imagine Components
updates.description: xAI's latest update lets you use up to 7 reference images when generating images and video via the @ symbol in prompts. Combined with video extension chaining, it's becoming a serious creative tool for multi-reference AI generation.

updates.name: obra/superpowers
updates.description: Open-source agentic skills framework written in Shell that makes composing AI agent behavior unusually accessible — no heavy Python boilerplate needed. A new approach to software development methodology with AI agents.

updates.name: AutoResearchClaw
updates.description: Fully autonomous research tool that takes an idea and produces a complete research paper — from literature review to methodology to findings. A powerful Python-based tool for academic and applied research workflows.
